vllm.title: [Core] Simplifications to executor classes
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Move the common executor field-setting __init__ logic to the ExecutorBase class.
Add missing tensorizer_config arg to ExecutorBase.__init__()
Fix incorrect return type of executor list_loras() method
Have check_health_async() implementation default to call check_health()

vllm.title: [Doc] Add better clarity for tensorizer usage
vllm.author: sangstar
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Some quick doc improvements that better explain tensorizer and how to use it for serializing & deserializing vLLM models and its usage with the vLLM OpenAI API server.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix ray workers profiling with nsight
vllm.author: rickyyx
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix the nsight profiling feature added in #3162
python benchmarks/benchmark_latency.py --model=meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf  --input-len 1000 --output-len 50 -
tp 2 --num-iters 5 --batch-size 1 --ray-workers-use-nsight

vllm.title: [Typing] Fix Sequence type GenericAlias only available after Python 3.9.
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Like Tuple or Deque type, Generic alias of some of built-in libraries are only available after Python 3.9. We are using collections.abc.Sequence's generic alias now, and this is not available in python 3.8 (it is available only from 3.9 similar to deque https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#

vllm.title: [Core] Fix engine-use-ray broken
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Looks like --engine-use-ray has been broken in the master.
The root case was that it access config through via args, but it is actually passed via kwargs.
I also added tests to verify engine-use-ray and worker-use-ray both works correctly
Closes #4100

vllm.title: LM Format Enforcer Guided Decoding Support
vllm.author: noamgat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #3713
This PR implements the issue raised by simon-mo to add LMFE decoding support to the OpenAI server via a command line argument.
It introduces a new command line arg
--guided-decoding-backend which defaults to outlines (current implementation) but also support lm-format-enforcer.
